dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5853 IH: To amend the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 to increase the civil penalties that may be imposed under such Act.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Self (for himself and Mr. McCaul) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 to increase the civil penalties that may be imposed under such Act.

section.header: Increase of civil penalties under Export Control Reform Act of 2018

subsection.text: Section 1760(c)(1)(A) of the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (50 U.S.C. 4819(c)(1)(A)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking twice the value of the transaction and inserting four times the value of the transaction.

subsection.text: This Act, and the amendments made by this Act, shall apply with respect to a violation of the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (50 U.S.C. 4801 et seq.) or any regulation, order, or license issued under such Act, committed on or after the date of the enactment of this Act.
